# mtncloud_key_pair (Resource)

Manages an MTN Cloud SSH key pair. Key pairs are immutable; any change forces a new resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mtncloud_key_pair" "deploy" {
  name       = "deploy"
  public_key = file("~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub")
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the key pair. Changing it forces a new key pair.
- `public_key` (String) The public key material. Changing it forces a new key pair.

### Optional

- `passphrase` (String, Sensitive) Passphrase protecting the private key. Write-only. Changing it forces a new key pair.
- `private_key` (String, Sensitive) The private key material. Write-only; the API stores only a hash and never returns it. Changing it forces a new key pair.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the key pair.
